title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
summary_full: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.
summary_public: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.
